arts.ttl: English giants chasing Frankfurt star - How would Man City line up with Omar Marmoush?
arts.sum: Manchester City’s desperate attempts to get their Premier League campaign back on track may come down to negotiating one of the biggest transfers in this month’s transfer...

arts.ttl: Rory McIlroy in bucket-list Borussia Dortmund trip as golf star goes unnoticed in iconic Yellow Wall
arts.sum: McIlroy might be one of the most recognisable faces in golf, but he was able to enjoy some Bundesliga action without being spotted

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Borussia Dortmund 'ramp up interest' in wantaway attacker
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund allegedly up their interest in one of Manchester United's wantaway attackers as they bid to get a January deal over the line.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Man City AGREE deal with Frankfurt for Marmoush transfer
arts.sum: Manchester City have reached an agreement to make their third major signing of the January transfer after striking a deal with Eintracht Frankfurt for Omar Marmoush. City have already agreed personal terms with Marmoush and the 25-year-old is set to miss Frankfurt’s game with Dortmund tomorrow in order to finalise a transfer in the coming days.

arts.ttl: Manchester City reach agreement with Eintract Frankfurt to sign Omar Marmoush
arts.sum: RMC Sport journalist Fabrice Hawkins understands that Manchester City and Eintracht Frankfurt have reached an agreement in principle over the signing of Omar Marmoush (25). Foot Mercato reported last week that the Premier League…

arts.ttl: Man City's Omar Marmoush bid 'rejected' - Will Eintracht Frankfurt star play against Borussia Dortmund in Bundesliga on Friday?
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly remain confident that they will complete the signing of attacker Omar Marmoush, despite having an official bid rejected by Eintracht Frankfurt.
Borussia Dortmund are showing a genuine interest in Marcus Rashford despite his high wages, according to Bild.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund 'ramp up interest' in Marcus Rashford after selling Donyell Malen to Aston Villa... but 'another Premier League star is top choice' over the Man United wantaway
arts.sum: Rashford, 27, admitted in a bombshell interview last month that he is ready to leave his boyhood club, and he has not played under Ruben Amorim since.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen builds fresh momentum with 10-game winning run as Dortmund hits trouble
arts.sum: Sure, it’s not last season’s record 51-game unbeaten run, and Leverkusen is still four points off Bayern, but it certainly means Alonso remains among world soccer’s most in-demand coaches ahead of Leverkusen’s Bundesliga game Saturday with Borussia Moenchengladbach. His team has just one win from its last seven games going back to November and hit a new low in a 4-2 loss to relegation-threatened Holstein Kiel on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Napoli target Karim Adeyemi and Mathys Tel as Khvicha Kvaratskhelia replacement
arts.sum: According to Patrick Berger, Napoli are targeting Borussia Dortmund’s Karim Adeyemi and Bayern Munich’s Mathys Tel as possible replacements for PSG-bound Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. During the summer, Adeyemi had been linked…
